extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each party: I counted only the Against our Company, Against our Subsidiaries and Against our Directors rows—criminal 4, statutory/regulatory 2 and tax 134 plus 2 subsidiary tax proceedings—and excluded all By rows and promoter-personal matters. For the group litigation amount, I used the stated aggregate amounts of ₹62,413.94 million against the Company and ₹10.05 million against subsidiaries, totaling ₹62,423.99 million, converted at ₹10 million per crore to ₹6,242.399 crore; this includes the company tax claims and excludes promoter matters. The contingent-liabilities table is in ₹ millions as of June 30, 2024 but has no stated Total row, so no contingent-liabilities total is extracted rather than summing line items. The only customer-concentration disclosures are absent; supplier, related-party, export and segment/product concentrations are not company-wide top-five/top-ten customer revenue percentages. The source uses mixed units because the promoter litigation table is in KRW million while the company/group litigation and contingent-liabilities tables are in ₹ million; the reported litigation amount was converted from ₹ million to crore as stated above.
